_comment: Example input for src/build_briefing.py. The Routine produces this file at /tmp/briefing_input.json. Do NOT commit a real one; this example is just a schema reference.

articles.title: Example article headline (max 90 chars)
articles.summary: One sentence — why should this user care?

talking_points.headline: Sharp executive headline (max 100 chars)
talking_points.why_it_matters: One sentence on why this matters for Adam's role.
bullets: Key fact — wrap names like John Doe, CEO of Bank
